description: A customer requires a pro forma invoice to arrange for financing before a large order is placed.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request for a pro forma invoice, including the list of products and quantities.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the details of the proposed order.

nodes.task_description: Generate a pro forma invoice document, which looks like a real invoice but is clearly marked 'Pro Forma' and is not posted to accounts receivable.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the pro forma invoice.

nodes.task_description: Send the pro forma invoice to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully emails the document to the customer.
